MINI MINUTES: Judge Ronald Evans Quidachay; Clerk: M. Smith; Not Reported. (D501)

Appearances:
Plaintiff San Francisco Housing Authority is present. Represented by Kendra. Crawford. Attorney Tony Ruch appearing for Plaintiff.
Defendant Kimberley Lopez is present.
Attorney Carolyn Gold representing the defendant through limited scope.

Litigants confer in D501.

This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
The trial date of JAN-09-2012 is vacated.
